description: Benchmark tests for api-doc-generator skill - Generates API documentation and OpenAPI specs from code

baseline_comparison.description: Developer manually reads source code and writes API documentation

evals.name: openapi-generation

assertions.name: has_openapi_version
assertions.description: Output must declare OpenAPI version 3.0.x

assertions.name: includes_post_users
assertions.description: Spec must include POST /users endpoint

assertions.name: includes_get_user_by_id
assertions.description: Spec must include GET /users/{user_id} endpoint

assertions.name: correct_status_codes
assertions.description: POST /users must show 201 status code

assertions.name: valid_yaml_or_json_structure
assertions.description: Output must be in valid YAML or JSON structure

evals.name: endpoint-extraction

assertions.name: extracts_all_5_endpoints
assertions.description: Should extract all 5 endpoints from the router

assertions.name: identifies_http_methods
assertions.description: Should correctly identify GET, POST, PUT, DELETE methods

assertions.name: identifies_path_params
assertions.description: Should identify :id or {id} path parameters

assertions.name: notes_auth_requirements
assertions.description: Should note authentication/authorization requirements

evals.name: schema-generation
evals.prompt:
Generate request and response schemas for a user registration endpoint based on this Pydantic model:

```python
class UserCreate(BaseModel):
    email: EmailStr
    password: str = Field(min_length=8, max_length=64)
    full_name: str = Field(max_length=100)
    role: Optional[str] = 'user'

class UserResponse(BaseModel):
    id: int
    email: EmailStr
    full_name: str
    role: str
    created_at: datetime
```

assertions.name: generates_request_schema
assertions.description: Should generate a schema for UserCreate (request body)

assertions.name: generates_response_schema
assertions.description: Should generate a schema for UserResponse

assertions.name: includes_field_constraints
assertions.description: Should include field constraints (min/max length, required/optional)

assertions.name: includes_field_types
assertions.description: Should include correct field types (string, integer, datetime)

assertions.name: marks_optional_fields
assertions.description: Optional fields (role) should be marked as not required

evals.name: multi-framework-support
evals.prompt:
Detect the framework and generate endpoint documentation for each of these three code snippets:

1. FastAPI: `@app.get('/health') async def health_check(): return {'status': 'ok'}`
2. Express: `app.get('/health', (req, res) => res.json({ status: 'ok' }))`
3. Flask: `@app.route('/health', methods=['GET']) def health_check(): return jsonify({'status': 'ok'})`

assertions.name: detects_fastapi
assertions.description: Should detect and label FastAPI framework

assertions.name: detects_express
assertions.description: Should detect and label Express.js framework

assertions.name: detects_flask
assertions.description: Should detect and label Flask framework

assertions.name: documents_all_three_endpoints
assertions.description: Should document all three /health endpoints

evals.name: markdown-doc-output
evals.prompt: Generate human-readable Markdown API documentation for a payments API with: POST /payments (create payment), GET /payments/{id} (get payment status), DELETE /payments/{id} (cancel payment). Include examples.

assertions.name: markdown_headers
assertions.description: Output must use Markdown headers (# or ##)

assertions.name: documents_all_endpoints
assertions.description: Should document POST /payments, GET /payments/{id}, DELETE /payments/{id}

assertions.name: includes_code_examples
assertions.description: Should include request/response code examples

assertions.name: includes_response_format
assertions.description: Should describe response format for each endpoint
